---
title: "Testing A Task Agent"
---

---
title: "Testing a Task Agent"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Agent-Builder/stu1752244084024"
section: "Hyland Agent Builder"
---

After selecting an agent, complete the following steps to test it:

1. Click on the Test button in the top right of the screen. ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
2. Enter test input values in the provided fields, or upload a JSON file containing test values directly. ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
3. Click on the Run Test button.
4. After the test process is finished, you'll receive the results of the test run you've launched.
